title: Step 5: Connect to the  process.
description:
When you use Encryption at Rest using Customer Key Management, Atlas encrypts the
mongod data files in your snapshots.  If you want to download and
restore a snapshot, the mongod can't read these data files unless it
has access to a KMIP (Key Management Interoperability) server that can provide the appropriate
decryption key. You can use the KMIP (Key Management Interoperability) Proxy Standalone to access the
mongod data files. You download the KMIP (Key Management Interoperability) Proxy Standalone as a
binary for your specific operating system.
